For kitchen & bath businesses

Your free 30-minute game plan

Thirty minutes with me, and you walk off with a plan to get found by the homeowners already looking and chosen over the business down the road. The kind of plan I’d normally only put together for a paying client.

It’s for owners who do good work and are done watching it go to businesses that do worse.

What do I call you?

A few quick details, there.

A little about your work.

Is your work mostly for homeowners, or builder and contractor accounts?

Roughly how many kitchens or baths a month?

There, what’s the one thing about getting found and getting picked online that’s eating at you most? (optional)

Don’t tidy it up. Give me the real version, in your own words. It’s the first thing I read before we talk.

Got your details. Pick a time that works.

Calendar not loading? Open it in a new tab →

You’re on the books

You’re on the books, there.

Check your email for the time and the call link. Before we talk, I’ll dig into your business’s setup so we don’t waste a minute playing catch-up.

See you then.
— Shane
